 {"id":"wa-1u90p.3.6","title":"Tune line-break readability cost model and expose policy/config controls","description":"Calibrate badness/penalty weights for terminal readability and predictable behavior. Provide configurable policy knobs with safe defaults and documented tradeoffs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.491423Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:38.775308Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","readability","reflow","resize","track-layout","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.6","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.491423Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.6","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.341211Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.6","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.447201Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.6","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:38.775267Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","title":"Build wrap-quality benchmark corpus and readability scorecard (greedy vs KP vs fallback)","description":"## Context
Smart wrapping must improve readability without hidden regressions. We need a repeatable corpus and objective scorecard.

## Scope
Create multilingual terminal-text corpora and scoring harnesses comparing greedy wrapping, KP wrapping, and fallback strategies.

## Deliverables
- Gold corpus with expected break quality notes
- Automated scorer (badness/readability/consistency metrics)
- Regression gate for wrap-quality deltas

## Why this matters
Prevents algorithm changes from silently degrading what users actually read.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Corpus covers code, logs, prose, long tokens, and Unicode-heavy samples.
- Scorecard outputs machine-readable per-sample metrics and aggregate deltas.
- CI/perf harness flags quality regressions beyond agreed tolerance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:29.854499Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:22:39.790994Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmark","knuth-plass","quality","reflow","resize","track-layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:29.854499Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:39.827886Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:18:31.729191Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:38.672337Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","title":"[Subtask wa-1u90p.3.2] Implement viewport-priority reflow planner and scheduling hooks","description":"## Scope
Build planner that identifies visible/near-visible lines and emits prioritized reflow work batches under frame budgets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Planner output is deterministic for identical input snapshots.
- Unit tests cover viewport boundaries, overscan windows, and empty/huge buffers.
- Logs include selected ranges and priority rationale per batch.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"VioletFinch","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.315297Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-14T01:26:06.387963Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T01:26:06.387948Z","close_reason":"Implemented deterministic viewport-priority reflow planner, scheduling hooks, per-batch rationale telemetry, and planner coverage tests (viewport/overscan, determinism, empty, huge).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["incremental","reflow","resize","subtask","track-layout","viewport"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:27.077766Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.315297Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:26.968987Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}],"comments":[{"id":160,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Implemented viewport-priority reflow planner + scheduling hooks in frankenterm/term/src/screen.rs. Added deterministic planning over logical-line physical ranges with three priorities (viewport, near viewport overscan, cold scrollback), bounded batch sizing, and plan coverage validation fallback. Wired planner into resize rewrap execution (cache miss path) so wrap work runs in deterministic priority batches. Added per-batch telemetry logs including logical ranges and rationale. Added unit tests: viewport_reflow_plan_prioritizes_viewport_then_near_then_cold, viewport_reflow_plan_is_deterministic_for_identical_snapshot, viewport_reflow_plan_handles_empty_buffer, viewport_reflow_plan_handles_huge_buffer_with_bounded_batches. Validation: rustfmt --check on touched file, cargo test -p frankenterm-term viewport_reflow_plan_, cargo test -p frankenterm-term rewrap_cache_, cargo check -p frankenterm-term --all-targets. cargo clippy -p frankenterm-term --all-targets -- -D warnings is currently blocked by pre-existing cross-crate clippy violations in frankenterm-blob-leases and frankenterm-char-props unrelated to this bead scope.","created_at":"2026-02-14T01:26:03Z"}]}
-{"id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","title":"[Subtask wa-1u90p.3.2] Implement background cold-scrollback completion worker","description":"## Scope
Implement asynchronous completion worker that converges cold scrollback reflow after interactive phase completes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Worker respects cancellation/latest-intent semantics.
- Integration tests verify eventual convergence and bounded memory growth.
- Logs include backlog depth, completion throughput, and cancellation counters.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"VioletFinch","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.426986Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-14T01:28:13.702607Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["incremental","reflow","resize","scrollback","subtask","track-layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.426986Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:27.189738Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}],"comments":[{"id":164,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Claimed and started. Reserved frankenterm/term/src/screen.rs + frankenterm/term/src/test/mod.rs. Completed archaeology of current rewrap/planner path and identified insertion points for cold-scrollback completion worker hooks (logical_wraps_for_resize/wrap_logical_lines_for_resize/rewrap_lines). Next implementation slice in progress: add cancellable latest-intent background completion state + backlog/throughput/cancel telemetry + convergence tests.","created_at":"2026-02-14T01:28:13Z"}]}
+{"id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","title":"[Subtask wa-1u90p.3.2] Implement background cold-scrollback completion worker","description":"## Scope
Implement asynchronous completion worker that converges cold scrollback reflow after interactive phase completes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Worker respects cancellation/latest-intent semantics.
- Integration tests verify eventual convergence and bounded memory growth.
- Logs include backlog depth, completion throughput, and cancellation counters.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"VioletFinch","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.426986Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-14T02:23:03.673334Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["incremental","reflow","resize","scrollback","subtask","track-layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:03.426986Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.3.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:27.189738Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}],"comments":[{"id":164,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Claimed and started. Reserved frankenterm/term/src/screen.rs + frankenterm/term/src/test/mod.rs. Completed archaeology of current rewrap/planner path and identified insertion points for cold-scrollback completion worker hooks (logical_wraps_for_resize/wrap_logical_lines_for_resize/rewrap_lines). Next implementation slice in progress: add cancellable latest-intent background completion state + backlog/throughput/cancel telemetry + convergence tests.","created_at":"2026-02-14T01:28:13Z"},{"id":179,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.3.9","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Progress slice landed: added cold-scrollback completion worker state + latest-intent cancellation semantics + backlog/throughput/cancellation telemetry in frankenterm/term/src/screen.rs. Reflow planner now reports cold worker metrics per intent: backlog_depth, peak_backlog_depth, completed_batches, completed_lines, throughput_lines_per_sec, cancellation_count. Added worker unit tests: cold_scrollback_worker_cancels_stale_intent, cold_scrollback_worker_tracks_completion_and_throughput, cold_scrollback_worker_caps_backlog_depth. Added integration-style resize test in frankenterm/term/src/test/mod.rs: test_resize_cold_scrollback_converges_and_bounds_line_growth (soft bounded growth + steady-state convergence/no-drift under repeated same-size resize). Validation: rustfmt check on touched files; cargo test -p frankenterm-term cold_scrollback_worker_; cargo test -p frankenterm-term test_resize_cold_scrollback_converges_and_bounds_line_growth; cargo check -p frankenterm-term --all-targets. Remaining follow-up before closure: wire true deferred/background cold batch execution (not only telemetry/state accounting) if stricter async behavior is required by downstream acceptance interpretation.","created_at":"2026-02-14T02:23:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4","title":"Render/Presentation Pipeline: Artifact-Free GPU-First Frames","description":"Eliminate visual artifacts and frame hitches with atomic presentation, dirty-region updates, and resilient GPU/CPU path parity.

## Success Criteria
- Child tasks for this track are completed or explicitly deferred with rationale.
- Track-level objectives are met with measurable evidence (correctness + performance where applicable).
- Validation artifacts and operational notes are captured for future maintainers.","design":"Artifact-free presentation + GPU optimization","acceptance_criteria":"No visual artifacts under stress; pacing in budget","notes":"Present only coherent frames","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:24:22.484619Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:29:43.711206Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","gpu","reflow","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:24:22.484619Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:27.746256Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}],"comments":[{"id":48,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"# Track 4 Detailed Intent: Render/Presentation Reliability + Throughput

## Core requirement
No incoherent intermediate frame may reach the user.

## Primary goals
- eliminate stretched/invalid transient visuals
- maintain visual continuity during reflow convergence
- minimize work through dirty-region updates
- stabilize frame pacing with hitch accounting

## Compatibility requirement
GPU acceleration is preferred, but CPU fallback must preserve behavior and pass equivalence checks.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:28:45Z"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","title":"Root-cause stretched-text and transient invalid-frame artifacts during resize","description":"Identify exact ordering/path issues that expose intermediate invalid buffers or stale transforms. Produce a concrete fault model and mitigation design.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":240,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.594914Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:30:50.582831Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["artifacts","gpu","reflow","render","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.555552Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.594914Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","title":"[Subtask wa-1u90p.4.2] Implement rollback/fallback handling for failed frame commits","description":"## Scope
Add robust rollback path when a candidate frame fails validation/commit.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Failure-injection tests verify clean fallback to last-good frame.
- No user-visible artifact leaks during rollback scenarios.
- Telemetry captures rollback cause taxonomy.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:04.212574Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:22:41.205376Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fallback","reflow","render","resize","subtask","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:04.212574Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.275353Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
